subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this Youth unto him who desireth to drink from the Kawthar of eternity through the chalice of transcendent glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا الغلام الی الذی اراد ان یشرب کوثر البقا من کاوس عز منیعا لعل
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
